content.query:
-- ************************************************************************************* --
-- parameter: [customer].[ext_inc_mortality_6_t] --
-- parameter: end year, start month, end month                               --
-- ************************************************************************************* --

-- 1. apply xd rules to mortality data
delete from [appl].[elsevier_deid_mortality_t];
insert into [appl].[elsevier_deid_mortality_t]
(
    [input_token]
    , [record_id]
    , [deceased_match_indicator]
    , [month_of_death]
    , [verified_or_proof_code]
    , [deceased_source]
    , [confidence_score]
)
select 
    a.[input_token]
    , a.[record_id]
    , a.[deceased_match_indicator]
    , case when deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
        and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2000 and 2025)
            or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and (cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '200001' and '202504'))
        and b.token is null then case when len(a.[date_of_death]) >= 6 then substring(a.[date_of_death], 1, 6) else date_of_death end
    else null
    end as month_of_death
    , case when deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
        and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2000 and 2025)
            or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and (cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '200001' and '202504'))
        and b.token is null then a.[verified_or_proof_code]
    else null
    end as [verified_or_proof_code]
    , case when deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
        and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2000 and 2025)
            or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and (cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '200001' and '202504'))
        and b.token is null then a.[deceased_source]
    else null
    end as [deceased_source]
    , case when deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
        and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2000 and 2025)
            or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and (cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '200001' and '202504'))
        and b.token is null then a.[confidence_score]
    else null
    end as [confidence_score]
from 
    [customer].[ext_inc_mortality_6_t] a
    left join [appl].[elsevier_claims_minor_tokens_t] b
        on a.input_token = b.token
;


-- select case when len(date_of_death) >= 6 then substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) else date_of_death end as month_of_death, count(*) as cnt
--  FROM [customer].[stg_incr_mortality_t]
